what_it_does: A leveled (Level 1-9) structural analysis of a single 30-page capital-raise pitch deck folder, cataloguing its surface format, grid, zoning, type, colour roles, iconography, atoms, layout archetypes, and narrative architecture, then diffing all findings against the design system (confirm/new/generalise/contradict) to feed token/diagram/atom registries.
observations: Translates all content to generic content-agnostic roles per a GUIDE so the analysis is about grammar not the actual pitch content
Uses a fixed 9-level analysis ladder (surface, grid, zoning, type, colour, icons, atoms, archetypes, narrative)
Atom catalogue is a table with explicit 'In system?' status markers (checkmark / plus-new / pencil-generalise)
Diff section uses a 4-symbol tag vocabulary: confirm / new / generalise / contradict
Records the 'running-sentence titles' rule where slide titles chain into one grammatical sentence via leading connectives (But/To/With/That/Which/By/And/Because)
Cites specific page numbers (p1, p5, p10, p20, p30) and exact hex values (#ffffff, #fdfcf7, #9fbc73, #cdbf5a)
Tracks an 'Open items / to verify next' section with one item marked RESOLVED (slice 28) inline
Asserts 'No contradictions' — the model survived a 30pp dense pitch with only additions
standouts: Running-sentence titles framed as 'the single strongest narrative rule the corpus has surfaced' — slide titles read as one continuing argument from the title rail alone

Graduation discipline: the sage-green communication accent is promoted to an L0 primitive only on three INDEPENDENT semantic uses within one folder, with a p5 legend that LITERALLY defines green='Communication' called the strongest (definitional) evidence kind
Explicitly distinguishes photographic green (foliage in renders) from a UI voice, refusing to graduate the latter from the former
Theme.light gains a clean↔warm sub-axis (#ffffff ⟷ #fdfcf7) framed as 'a knob, not a redraw'
conventions: Evidence-grounded: every claim cites page numbers and exact hex/measurement values
Re-confirmation discipline: notes when a property holds for the Nth folder (margins 'ratio-invariant, re-confirmed a 4th time')
Token-driven framing: findings route to specific files (tokens/theme.css, tokens/imagery.css, DIAGRAMS.md, DiagramSolver)
Registry-as-truth: atoms checked against a system registry, new ones marked for registry growth
Axis thinking: surface ⟂ density ⟂ LOD treated as orthogonal axes
Single-source / no-redraw framing: variations expressed as sub-positions on a knob, never as contradictions
concerns: Several findings are single-folder-deep (running-sentence titles called 'single-folder-deep but unambiguous'); the doc flags this itself but still routes some to graduation
The 'No contradictions' conclusion is self-reported with no adversarial check shown
Open items reference a 'slice 28' and other docs (DIAGRAMS.md, tokens/*.css) whose state cannot be confirmed from this file
notes: A deep leveled grammar-analysis of one capital-raise deck that both re-confirms the design model and surfaces new rules (running-sentence titles, frosted bookends, sage-green semantic, five diagram sub-types), with a disciplined diff feeding the token/atom/diagram registries.
questions: What is the GUIDE that defines the content-agnostic role translation, and where does it live?
What is 'slice 28' and the FINDINGS-LOG referenced as resolving the sage-green open item?
Are the five new diagram sub-types actually added to DIAGRAMS.md/DiagramSolver, or just proposed here?
How are single-folder-deep findings (running-sentence titles) reconciled against the multi-folder graduation bar applied to sage-green?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the header states it is a folder analysis that re-confirms the model and surfaces new grammar, and the body delivers exactly that across nine levels plus a system diff.
intention_signals: Inferred: the author is reverse-engineering an existing pitch corpus into a formal, queryable design grammar — extracting reusable atoms/diagrams/colour-roles and feeding them into a single-sourced token/registry system, with a strong bias toward only graduating a finding to a system primitive when the evidence is definitional or multi-instance. The running-sentence-titles discovery suggests an intent to capture narrative structure as a buildable deck property/capability, not just visual style.
novelty: The 'running-sentence titles' rule (titles chaining into one argument via leading connectives) and the explicit definitional-vs-multi-instance graduation bar for promoting a colour to a system primitive are unusual; so is treating photographic-vs-UI colour as a distinction that blocks graduation.
contribution: Contributes a leveled grammar-extraction method, the running-sentence-title narrative rule, a content-agnostic atom/archetype catalogue with system-status tags, the clean↔warm theme sub-axis, the sage-green communication semantic with its definitional-evidence graduation rationale, and five new diagram sub-types — all routed to specific registries.
summary_for_embedding: A nine-level structural analysis of a 30-page capital-raise pitch deck cataloguing its format, grid, colour roles, atoms, archetypes, and narrative, diffed against a design system to feed token/diagram/atom registries.
intention_for_embedding: To reverse-engineer a pitch deck into a formal single-sourced design grammar, surfacing new rules (running-sentence titles, semantic colours, diagram sub-types) and graduating them to system primitives only on strong evidence.
